prompt: Create a stylized fashion editorial portrait of a person from the chest up, centered and shot from a slightly low angle against a dense smoky studio background. The subject wears an oversized iridescent metallic puffer jacket in holographic silver-blue with pink reflections, with a high zipped collar, crinkled foil texture, a diagonal black zipper pocket on the right chest, and a large raised NIKE wordmark with swoosh across the front. The background is filled with dramatic colored fog in blue, violet, and hot pink, softly blended with no visible horizon. The person has a shaved or very short head with hints of red/pink lighting and small hoop earrings, but the face is intentionally covered by a centered opaque square censor block in muted mauve-purple, extending from the forehead area to below the mouth. Use glossy high-fashion lighting, neon cyberpunk color grading, realistic fabric reflections, sharp detail on the jacket, shallow depth of field, square-cropped composition, and a moody futuristic streetwear campaign aesthetic.
